title: Physics Manipulation
wikitext:
[[File:Ambrose_Chase_001.png|thumb|400px|Ambrose Chase is able to manipulate the laws of physics within a limited area centered around him.]]

==Summary==
'''Physics Manipulation''' is the ability to distort, alter, and manipulate the laws of physics and the fundamental forces that govern natural phenomena in the universe (such as velocity, momentum, inertia, nuclear forces, etc.). As a result, one may be able to replicate virtually every phenomenon possible in nature or through science and cancel it just as easily. In more advanced cases the potency of this ability may be high enough to outright break physical laws and allow for impossible scenarios to happen.

==Possible Uses==
Some applications include:
* '''[[Elemental Manipulation]]:''' Users may be able to replicate various kinds of phenomenona possible in the universe, including the creation and manipulation of elements such as fire, water, and air.
* '''[[Energy Manipulation]]:''' Since the transfer of energy is governed by the laws of physics, control over various kinds of energy via Physics Manipulation may be a logical extension of the ability.
* '''[[Matter Manipulation]]:''' The counterpart to manipulating energy, users with control over physical laws may be able to alter matter.
* '''[[Reality Warping]]:''' Particularly potent users can outright break the laws of physics to achieve nearly anything, or even create new laws to impose their will on reality.
